hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -notlike '*package.json') { $raw = Get-Content 'package.json' -Raw; $m = [regex]::Match($raw, '"version": "(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)"'); $newV = "$($m.Groups[1].Value).$($m.Groups[2].Value).$([int]$m.Groups[3].Value+1)"; $raw = $raw -replace '"version": "\d+\.\d+\.\d+"', "\"version\": \"$newV\""; [IO.File]::WriteAllText((Resolve-Path 'package.json').Path, $raw); git add 'package.json' 2>$null }; git add "$f" 2>$null; if (git status --porcelain 2>$null) { git commit -m "auto: update $(Split-Path -Leaf $f)" 2>$null; git push 2>$null }; exit 0
